description_long: This is a modern, armless chair with a wide, rectangular seat and backrest upholstered in dark brown leather or faux leather. The seat and backrest are both thickly padded, providing comfort and a slightly contoured sitting surface. The chair is supported by a sleek, black metal frame that curves smoothly from the base to the back, forming two continuous sled-style legs. The rear of the chair features a horizontal metal support bar integrated into the frame for added stability. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, making it suitable for urban environments such as waiting areas, lobbies, or modern offices.
description: A modern, armless chair with dark brown leather upholstery and a black metal sled base, featuring a minimalist and contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, padded seat and backrest with no armrests and a clean, rectangular profile.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick cushioning, the backward-angled backrest, and the curved sled-style metal base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the horizontal metal support bar and the full width of the backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the left profile with visible seat thickness and the continuous metal frame.
